title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How is AI affecting different sectors of society?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two sectors are being most significantly affected by AI.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how AI is affecting different sectors of society.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two sectors are being most significantly affected.
